narrative:
Cols 69-I (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,122 registered voters, with 56.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.7%, a modest Republican lean of 4.1 percentage points.
